name: Micky Phim Swimming Pool Club
nameThai: มิกกี้พิม สวิมมิ่งพูลคลับ
addressFull: WWG7+VPM, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Open daily; Google Maps currently shows closing at 20:00

practical.changingFacilities: Showers reported; hot water not available in one visitor account

praise: Reviewers value the inexpensive public entry, space, parking and friendly food service.
complaints: Two recent Thai reviews raise water-quality concerns: one reported brown water in both pools and another described an unpleasant taste despite clearer water.
A visitor notes that showers do not provide hot water.

sources.label: Google Maps listing and Thai reviews
Wanderlog profile, visitor reports and price

confidenceReason: It clears four source families as a day-pass pool, but the swimming category's required lesson, instructor and pool-specification fields are absent; current hygiene concerns also need direct checking.
unverified: pool length, lanes, depth and heating
